Jarod Lucas

Position: Guard

6-3, 195lb (190cm, 88kg)

Hometown: Hacienda Heights, CA

High School: Los Altos HS

Schools: Oregon State (Men) and Nevada (Men)

  • 2x All-MWC
  • 2021 All-Pac-12 Tourney
+1
